title: TideMaid
description: A compatibility mod between Tide and Touhou Little Maid, adding a task mode that allows maids to catch Tide fish.
body:
# TideMaid

A compatibility mod between **Tide** and **Touhou Little Maid**, allowing maids to catch special fish from the Tide mod.

![TideMaid Feature Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f08e54a9d4412a72d36a2e9eacf265bc3158d553.jpeg)

## Features

- **Tide Fishing Task**: Adds a new fishing task for maids, enabling them to use fishing rods to catch Tide's special fish
- **Automatic Fishing**: Maids will automatically find water bodies and fish for Tide resources

![Maid Fishing Task Interface](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/133c243195b74c3f9ae45fe0de56f1cb3d323812.png)

## How to Use

1. Give your maid a fishing rod
2. Assign the "Tide Fishing" task to the maid
3. The maid will find nearby water and start fishing for Tide fish

![Maid Auto Fishing Process](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1909076bdf22577ef13aabc45a44a67daac1bd9c.jpeg)

## Requirements

This mod requires the following mods to be installed:

- [Touhou Little Maid](https://modrinth.com/mod/touhou-little-maid)
- [Tide](https://modrinth.com/mod/tide)
- NeoForge

## Support

If you encounter any issues or have suggestions, please report them on the [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/CHA1007/TideMaid/issues) page.
